name: phase-5-codex-live-bridge

checklist.item: Phase 5 Codex Live Bridge test checklist
checklist.summary: User confirmed the checklist without changes and requested continuation.

notes: TQ-001 through TQ-004 confirmed as option A on 2026-06-09.
Conversation reset keeps option A and adds an explicit Codex context compaction action.
Checklist confirmed by the user on 2026-06-09.
Todolist created with TODO-001 through TODO-012.
Execution plan created with six steps traceable to TODO-001 through TODO-012.
Phase 5 implementation completed with live Codex app-server, durable conversation mapping, busy guard, reset/compact APIs, UI integration, focused tests, and operator documentation.
Core tests and browser acceptance ran with _VO_INT=1 and demo=false.

Supplemental host-level verification confirmed OpenClaw gateway 2026.6.1 is healthy on port 18790; the earlier unavailable result came from the intentionally isolated test configuration and sandbox networking.
OpenClaw and Hermes non-Codex regression routes passed with real replies.
OpenClaw-to-Codex and Hermes-to-Codex live communication routes passed with real Codex replies.
Real conversation isolation and post-reset context clearing passed; history recorded distinct thread IDs before and after reset.
Implementation remains awaiting user confirmation before confirmed.tested can be set true.
